Home.heroTitle: Building the financial infrastructure for real-world assets in Latin America
Home.heroSubtitle: Equitty is developing financial infrastructure to connect El Salvador to global investors.
Home.opportunityParagraphOne: $16 trillion in real-world assets are expected to be tokenized by 2030. Latin America has some of the most underserved investment infrastructure on the planet. And 2.5 million Salvadorans living in the United States send over $10 billion home every year—with no regulated channel to convert that capital into long-term ownership.
Home.opportunityParagraphTwo: El Salvador passed the DASP Law, established 0% capital gains tax on digital assets, and created the only end-to-end digital asset regulatory framework in Latin America. The infrastructure layer to take advantage of this moment does not exist yet. EQUITTY is building it.
Home.statsOne: $2.5B+ in Salvadoran diaspora capital ready to invest
Home.statsThree: $16T projected global tokenized RWA market by 2030
Home.buildingSubtitle: EQUITTY will be a two-sided, regulated investment marketplace—the infrastructure layer connecting qualified global investors to vetted real-world assets in Latin America.
Home.investorsBulletOne: Access to high-quality Latin American assets
Home.investorsBulletTwo: Designed to allow participation from $100 (when licensed)
Home.partnersBulletOne: Real estate developers and infrastructure owners
Home.partnersBulletFour: Access to diaspora and institutional capital pools

About.heroTitle: Built by operators. Governed by leaders. Built for the long term.
About.heroSubtitle: EQUITTY is being built by a cross-border team of fintech founders, capital strategists, legal architects, and technology leaders—with a board and advisory structure designed for institutional credibility.
About.missionText: To connect U.S. and global capital to real-world assets across Latin America—through a compliant, transparent, and scalable platform that opens access for both qualified retail and institutional investors.
About.whyText: Capital exists. Assets exist. The regulated infrastructure connecting them does not. EQUITTY is closing that gap—starting in El Salvador, scaling across Latin America.
About.boardIntro: EQUITTY is governed with institutional standards from day one. Our board provides strategic oversight, accountability, and credibility to regulators and investors alike.
About.closingTitle: Want to learn more or explore a partnership?

martin.name: Martín Cruz
martin.bio: 25+ years scaling businesses across Texas and El Salvador. Bitcoin advocate and tokenization pioneer leading EQUITTY's vision, regulatory strategy, and DASP licensing.
martin.signal: U.S.–LatAm market development, blockchain adoption, founder-led execution

josh.name: Josh Alballero
josh.bio: Financial strategist and serial entrepreneur. Founded IOOGO, raised $7.6M, achieved a $10M+ exit. Leads EQUITTY's capital strategy, investor relations, and fundraising execution.
josh.signal: Venture fundraising, financial planning, revenue operations

mario.name: Mario Meléndez
mario.bio: 15+ years in operations and performance marketing for U.S. markets. Founder of The Hub Lab. Leads EQUITTY's growth engine, partnerships, and market expansion.
mario.signal: Operations scale-up, growth strategy, U.S. market execution

oscar.name: Oscar Merino
oscar.bio: 12+ years building mission-critical infrastructure. Led enterprise technology integrations at Save the Children US. Drives EQUITTY's Web3 architecture and institutional-grade technical standards.
oscar.signal: Mission-critical systems, enterprise integrations, blockchain infrastructure

sigfredo.name: Sigfredo Figueroa
sigfredo.bio: Founder of LEXGLOBAL | Legal advisor, El Salvador Energy Directorate | Key legal advisor in drafting the Law on the Issuance of Digital Assets (LEAD)

joseLuis.name: José Luis Ortiz
joseLuis.bio: Founder of TechyWe.com | Technology infrastructure and enterprise leadership

erick.name: Erick Chacón
erick.bio: Founder of PaySea | President at ASAFINTECH | FinTech industry leadership in El Salvador

ricardo.name: Ricardo Granillo
ricardo.bio: 30+ years scaling markets across LatAm | TACA, Bayer, GSK, TIGO | Institutional network and sector access

Platform.heroSubtitle: A credible preview of how EQUITTY will connect capital to real-world assets within a regulated framework.
Platform.problemTitle: Capital exists. Assets exist. Access does not.
Platform.problemBody: Today, there is no regulated infrastructure connecting global and diaspora capital to Latin American real estate, infrastructure, and private assets. Traditional channels require minimums of $250,000 or more. There is no retail access point. There is no institutional gateway. There is no secondary market.
Platform.problemBodyTwo: EQUITTY is designed to solve this within a compliant, regulated framework.
Platform.discoverText: Browse curated, vetted real-world assets—real estate, infrastructure, and private credit opportunities across Latin America, each with transparent financial information and regulatory documentation.
Platform.investText: Participate through a compliant onboarding process. The platform is being designed to allow participation from $100 (when licensed), with full institutional-grade structuring available at scale.
Platform.earnText: Receive distributions and track real-time performance through the investor dashboard—built for transparency and ongoing reporting.
Platform.exitText: Access secondary market liquidity through the platform's trading infrastructure—planned for Phase 4, subject to regulatory milestones.
Platform.disclaimer: All platform features described are in development and subject to regulatory approval, licensing, and phased launch readiness.
Platform.listingCta: Interested in listing your project? Contact us

Regulatory.heroTitle: Compliance is not a checkbox. It is the foundation.
Regulatory.heroSubtitle: EQUITTY is being designed within El Salvador's digital asset regulatory framework from day one. We are not launching first and filing later. We are filing first, building the infrastructure, and launching only when ready.
Regulatory.pillarOneText: EQUITTY is applying for the DASP license under El Salvador's Ley de Activos Digitales—the only end-to-end digital asset law in Latin America. We are not operating in a legal gray area. We are operating on the law.
Regulatory.pillarTwoText: EQUITTY Holdings Inc. (Delaware C-Corp) owns EQUITTY S.A.S. de C.V. (El Salvador). This dual structure provides institutional-grade governance through U.S. law while operating under El Salvador's favorable digital asset framework.
Regulatory.pillarThreeText: Assets will be structured through dedicated Delaware SPVs. Capital deployment will follow milestone-based release triggers. KYC/AML will be embedded before any funds move. Each offering will be filed with CNAD under the applicable private tokenization framework.
Regulatory.pillarFourText: EQUITTY is committed to disclosing regulatory status clearly and publicly at all times. When the DASP license is granted, we will announce it. When phase milestones are reached, we will share them.
Regulatory.launchTitle: Who can invest when we launch
Regulatory.launchBody: When EQUITTY launches its first offering (targeted Q3 2026, subject to DASP approval), access will initially be restricted to authorized and qualified investors as defined by applicable law under the CNAD framework. General public retail access will follow in a subsequent phase. We are not accepting investor applications, expressions of interest, or capital commitments at this time.

Updates.heroSubtitle: Follow our progress: regulatory milestones, product development, ecosystem insights, and company updates as we build the financial infrastructure for real-world assets in Latin America.
Updates.introBody: This newsroom will publish milestone updates, ecosystem signals, and company news as we advance toward launch.

Footer.footerDisclaimer: This website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute an offer to sell, a solicitation to buy, or an invitation to invest in any security or digital asset.
Footer.termsModalDescription: Review the legal terms that govern the informational use of this website and newsletter.

sections.title: 1. INFORMATIONAL USE ONLY
sections.body: The content on this website is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, legal advice, or a solicitation to invest.

sections.title: 2. REGULATORY STATUS
sections.body: EQUITTY is in a pre-launch phase. DASP license application status is pending with CNAD, El Salvador.

sections.title: 3. NO INVESTMENT ENROLLMENT
sections.body: Newsletter subscription is intended exclusively for company and product updates. It is not an investor application process.

sections.title: 4. DATA AND COMMUNICATION
sections.body: By subscribing, users consent to receive informational updates. Unsubscribe options are provided in every email communication.

termsContent.footer: For legal questions, contact the EQUITTY team.
